authors: Jennifer Forestal Helen Houlahan Rigali Assistant Professor of Political Science
raw_title: How Should We Study Multiple Platforms? Lessons from Deliberative Systems Theory
title_en: How Should We Study Multiple Platforms? Lessons from Deliberative Systems Theory
title_zh: 我们应如何研究多个平台？来自审议系统理论的启示
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了如何研究多个数字平台上的政治传播，借鉴了审议系统理论的观点。它建议研究者不应只关注单个平台，而应考察不同平台如何共同影响公共讨论。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how to study political communication across multiple digital platforms, drawing on deliberative systems theory. It suggests researchers should examine how different platforms collectively shape public discourse rather than focusing on single platforms.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于数字时代政治传播方法论领域，关注跨平台研究框架的开发与应用。
research_direction_en: This research falls within the methodology of political communication in the digital age, focusing on developing and applying cross-platform research frameworks.
